pi_items.source: Task description in task.json explicitly requires this recipient.
Task description in task.json explicitly requires setting the Reply-To header to this address.
Task description in task.json explicitly requires this subject.
setup_task.sh script generates a file with this name, and the task description instructs the agent to attach it.
Task description requires setting Priority to "Highest", which corresponds to X-Priority: 1 in Thunderbird, as checked by verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires sending an email to opposing.counsel@lawfirm.com with a Reply-To address of paralegal@mylawfirm.com, subject "URGENT: Settlement Agreement", highest priority (X-Priority: 1), and a synthetically generated attachment named settlement_agreement.pdf. These parameters are confirmed by the task description and setup script.
